creator: ambrisko@ambrisko.com
text:
Akinori MUSHA writes:
| What would the maintainer say?

Looks fine and would bring in some more useful functions

Doug A.
 
| At Mon, 27 Aug 2001 23:06:27 +0400 (MSD),
| Sergey A.Osokin <osa@FreeBSD.org.ru> wrote:
| > >Number:         30137
| > >Category:       ports
| > >Synopsis:       update net/etherboot from 5.0.1 to 5.0.3
| > 
| > >Description:
| > 	update net/etherboot from 5.0.1 to 5.0.3
| > >How-To-Repeat:
| > >Fix:
| > 
| > diff -ruN etherboot.old/Makefile etherboot/Makefile
| > --- etherboot.old/Makefile	Fri Aug 24 15:37:44 2001
| > +++ etherboot/Makefile	Fri Aug 24 15:33:19 2001
| > @@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
| >  #
| >  
| >  PORTNAME=	etherboot
| > -PORTVERSION=	5.0.1
| > +PORTVERSION=	5.0.3
| >  CATEGORIES=	net
| >  #MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
| >  #MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	${PORTNAME}
| > @@ -17,6 +17,7 @@
| >  MAINTAINER=	ambrisko@ambrisko.com
| >  
| >  NO_PACKAGE=	lots of configuration necessary
| > +USE_BZIP2=1
| >  USE_GMAKE=1
| >  WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${DISTNAME}/src
| >  
| > diff -ruN etherboot.old/distinfo etherboot/distinfo
| > --- etherboot.old/distinfo	Fri Aug 24 15:37:44 2001
| > +++ etherboot/distinfo	Fri Aug 24 15:35:01 2001
| > @@ -1 +1 @@
| > -MD5 (etherboot-5.0.1.tar.gz) = a08916065c8a37d92cf1bcc1bb687d96
| > +MD5 (etherboot-5.0.3.tar.bz2) = 07a3acb536e1fb4488f5f6fd25fa628b
